channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kim Zolciak Resolves Divorce Financial Obligations to Avoid Jail Time
item.description: Kim Zolciak, a former cast member of 'Real Housewives of Atlanta,' has resolved a legal dispute by paying $2,535 in unpaid fees to a court-appointed guardian, thereby avoiding potential jail time. The...

item.title: Pinda leads urban tree planting initiative for environmental sustainability
item.description: The article highlights Pinda's efforts in promoting urban tree planting as a key strategy for environmental sustainability. It mentions training programs and control centers aimed at revitalizing the ...

item.title: UK Experiences Temporary Cooling Amid Ongoing Dry Spell
item.description: The UK is set to experience a brief respite from the ongoing heatwave as cooler temperatures arrive in parts of the country. However, the prolonged dry spell is expected to persist, with significant i...

item.title: Pakistan and Venezuela Strengthen Economic Ties Through High-Level Dialogue
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar engaged in a phone call with Venezuela's newly appointed Foreign Minister Felix Plasencia, emphasizing the 'considerable potential' for enhancing e...

item.title: Witness no-shows mount as Carrim faces medical testimony delay
item.description: The Investigating Directorate Against Corruption (Idac) is under intense scrutiny following reports that the 'Madlanga sick bay' has claimed another witness. This comes amid pressure on North West bus...

item.title: German Groom Adheres to Kenyan Tradition by Walking Cows for Dowry Ceremony
item.description: A German man recently experienced a unique cultural tradition when he walked cows to his Kenyan in-laws as part of a dowry ceremony. Mudge Rulf, a Kenyan epidemiologist living in Germany, shared how h...

item.title: Microsoft's Workaround Raises Security Concerns for U.S. Defense Department
item.description: ProPublica's investigation revealed Microsoft's practice of using Chinese engineers to support the U.S. Defense Department through a 'digital escort' system, where code was transferred via U.S. citize...

item.title: Hamilton Tiger-Cats edge Argonauts in thrilling CFL showdown
item.description: The Hamilton Tiger-Cats secured a dramatic 24-23 victory over the Toronto Argonauts in a tightly contested CFL matchup. Veteran kicker Lirim Hajrullahu's missed 31-yard field goal on the game's final ...

item.title: Prefab homes in Sweden could offer solution to Australia's housing crisis
item.description: The article explores the potential of prefabricated housing, inspired by Sweden's successful model, to address Australia's housing shortages. It highlights how modular homes, akin to IKEA's furniture,...

item.title: England clinch World Cup third place with 6-4 victory over France in thrilling match
item.description: England produced a stunning attacking display to defeat France 6-4 in a dramatic FIFA World Cup third-place playoff, securing their best World Cup finish since 1966. Bukayo Saka was the star of the ni...

item.title: Manipur Police Conducts Major Reshuffle, Transfers 83 Officers Across Key Units
item.description: The Manipur Police has initiated a significant administrative change by transferring and posting 83 officers across various police stations, command units, and specialized wings. The reshuffle, ordere...

item.title: Sonam Wangchuk Terms Hospital Stay 'Illegal Detention', Calls for July 20 Parliament March
item.description: The article discusses Sonam Wangchuk, an Indian politician and environmental activist, who has publicly criticized his hospitalization at Safdarjung Hospital in New Delhi. He alleges that his detentio...

item.title: Laguna to Enhance Disaster Response with AI Command Center
item.description: Laguna is set to develop an AI-powered command center aimed at strengthening disaster preparedness and response mechanisms. The initiative, spearheaded by Governor Sol Aragones, seeks to leverage adva...

item.title: Badejo-Okusanya Leads in NBA Election as Female Presidential Bid Gains Momentum
item.description: Senior Advocate Oyinkansola Badejo-Okusanya is making history in the Nigerian Bar Association (NBA) presidential election. As of 9:00 p.m., she has secured 10,554 votes (46.16% of counted ballots), wi...

item.title: Eurovision 2023: Key winners and notable performances
item.description: The Eurovision Song Contest 2023 concluded with a mix of triumphant victories and unexpected outcomes. Ukraine's Kalush Orchestra retained their title with their powerful anthem 'Stefania,' marking a ...

item.title: Chelsea's Morgan Rogers joins elite list of most expensive football transfers
item.description: Chelsea has shattered transfer records by paying KSh 20.2 billion (€137M) for Morgan Rogers, making him the most expensive British footballer. This deal surpasses previous records, including Mancheste...

item.title: R400m valuation error in Lanseria dispute linked to Wikipedia reliance
item.description: The Public Investment Corporation (PIC) faces criticism for a R400m financial misstep in a dispute over Lanseria International Airport's valuation. Arbitrators reportedly relied on a Wikipedia entry t...

item.title: In-Laws Make Plans Without Consultation, Straining Family Dynamics
item.description: The article discusses a couple's frustration with their in-laws who habitually make travel plans for the family without consulting them. Despite the in-laws being described as 'lovely people,' their u...

item.title: WPS access ensures livelihoods of 450k fisherfolk and national food security
item.description: The livelihoods of over 450,000 Filipino fisherfolk and the country's food security depend on secure access to the West Philippine Sea (WPS), according to Agriculture Undersecretary Drusila Esther Bay...

item.title: Tanzania Launches Training Programs to Revitalize TAZARA Infrastructure
item.description: The article discusses Tanzania's initiative to establish training and control centres aimed at revitalizing the TAZARA railway project. These centres will focus on capacity building, technical skills ...
